div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 35px; margin-left: 11px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Eviction Requester
(node maintenance, descheduler,
cluster autoscaler, etc.)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 98px; height: 1px; padding-top: 40px; margin-left: 751px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.div: APIServer

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 40px; margin-left: 511px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Eviction Request Controller

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-end; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 727px; margin-left: 575px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: #ffffff; white-space: nowrap;
div.div: Terminate the pod (usually evict or delete) when the eviction process of the
pod is complete. Optionally complete without terminating the pod and
set .status.responders[].completionTime.
Check if it is still the active responder, cancel the eviction if not.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-end; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 727px; margin-left: 895px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: #ffffff; white-space: nowrap;
div.div: Terminate the pod.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 40px; margin-left: 311px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Responder
(e.g. deployment controller,
imperative-eviction.k8s.io)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-end; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 97px; margin-left: 594px;

div.div: Register a responder by adding it to the pod's .spec.evictionResponders

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 98px; height: 1px; padding-top: 40px; margin-left: 951px;

with an Active state. Verify the Eviction

for a pod and add itself to the .spec.requesterName

div.div: Select the next Responder with higher index (starts at index 0) from
.status.targetResponders; set its state to Active. Last one
is default imperative-eviction.k8s.io/evictor responder,

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-end; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 517px; margin-left: 555px;

div.div: Start eviction process (e.g., data migration, upscaling, finalization).

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-end; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 557px; margin-left: 585px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

div.div: Indicate progress by periodically updating the Eviction
responder's status (e.g. .heartbeatTime).

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-end; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 597px; margin-left: 678px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: #ffffff; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Observe the Eviction status.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-end; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 657px; margin-left: 740px;

div.div: Ensure the Eviction status is up to date and there is a matching
EvictionRequest with Eviction intent, set the active responder
state to Interrupted or Canceled if it is not.
